visualizerParams.title: Coin Sums
visualizerParams.description: Calculate the number of ways to make a given amount of pence using eight standard coins.
visualizerParams.ghostCode:
def solution(pence: int = 200) -> int:
    """
    Returns the number of different ways to make pence using 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200p coins.
    Uses dynamic programming.
    """
    coins = [1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200]
    ways = [0] * (pence + 1)
    ways[0] = 1 # Base case: 1 way to make 0p (using no coins)
    
    for coin in coins:
        for amount in range(coin, pence + 1):
            ways[amount] += ways[amount - coin]
            
    return ways[pence]


if __name__ == "__main__":
    target = int(input("Enter target amount in pence: ").strip())
    print(f"Ways to make {target}p: {solution(target)}")
visualizerParams.finalCode:
def solution(pence: int = 200) -> int:
    """
    Returns the number of different ways to make pence using 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200p coins.
    Uses dynamic programming.
    """
    coins = [1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200]
    ways = [0] * (pence + 1)
    ways[0] = 1 # Base case: 1 way to make 0p (using no coins)
    
    for coin in coins:
        for amount in range(coin, pence + 1):
            ways[amount] += ways[amount - coin]
            
    return ways[pence]


if __name__ == "__main__":
    target = int(input("Enter target amount in pence: ").strip())
    print(f"Ways to make {target}p: {solution(target)}")
